languages.text: "О его притязаниях мне хорошо известно. Но, как бы я к ним ни относилась, этого мало, чтобы счесть его убийцей. Либо нам недостает связующего звена".

traits.locale_text: "О его притязаниях мне хорошо известно. Но, как бы я к ним ни относилась, этого мало, чтобы счесть его убийцей. Либо нам недостает связующего звена".

languages.text: "I am well aware of his ambitions. But, however I may feel about them, it is not cause to call him a murderer. Or perhaps we are missing a link in the chain."
languages.original_text: "О его притязаниях мне хорошо известно. Но, как бы я к ним ни относилась, этого мало, чтобы счесть его убийцей. Либо нам недостает связующего звена".

traits.locale_text: "I am well aware of his ambitions. But, however I may feel about them, it is not cause to call him a murderer. Or perhaps we are missing a link in the chain."
"I am well aware of his ambitions. But, however I may feel about them, it is not cause to call him a murderer. Or perhaps we are missing a link in the chain."
"I am well aware of his ambitions. But, however I may feel about them, it is not cause to call him a murderer. Or perhaps we are missing a link in the chain."

languages.text: “他的野心，我自然清楚。但不管我对此做何感想，这都不足以指认他是凶手。或许，我们漏掉了其中的某个环节。”
languages.original_text: "I am well aware of his ambitions. But, however I may feel about them, it is not cause to call him a murderer. Or perhaps we are missing a link in the chain."

traits.locale_text: “他的野心，我自然清楚。但不管我对此做何感想，这都不足以指认他是凶手。或许，我们漏掉了其中的某个环节。”

languages.text: « Ses ambitions ne sont un secret pour personne, mais quel que soit mon sentiment à leur égard, ça ne fait pas de lui un meurtrier pour autant. À moins qu'il nous manque un maillon de la chaîne. »
languages.original_text: "I am well aware of his ambitions. But, however I may feel about them, it is not cause to call him a murderer. Or perhaps we are missing a link in the chain."

traits.locale_text: « Ses ambitions ne sont un secret pour personne, mais quel que soit mon sentiment à leur égard, ça ne fait pas de lui un meurtrier pour autant. À moins qu'il nous manque un maillon de la chaîne. »

languages.text: "Hırslarının gayet farkındayım. Fakat bu hırslara karşı beslediğim hisler, ona katil damgası vurmaya yeterli değil. Ya da belki de zincirin halkalarından birini gözden kaçırıyoruz."
languages.original_text: "I am well aware of his ambitions. But, however I may feel about them, it is not cause to call him a murderer. Or perhaps we are missing a link in the chain."

traits.locale_text: "Hırslarının gayet farkındayım. Fakat bu hırslara karşı beslediğim hisler, ona katil damgası vurmaya yeterli değil. Ya da belki de zincirin halkalarından birini gözden kaçırıyoruz."

languages.text: «Soy muy consciente de sus ambiciones. Pero, independientemente de mi opinión al respecto, no es motivo para considerarlo un asesino. Quizá nos falte un eslabón en la cadena».
languages.original_text: "I am well aware of his ambitions. But, however I may feel about them, it is not cause to call him a murderer. Or perhaps we are missing a link in the chain."

traits.locale_text: «Soy muy consciente de sus ambiciones. Pero, independientemente de mi opinión al respecto, no es motivo para considerarlo un asesino. Quizá nos falte un eslabón en la cadena».

languages.text: "Ich bin mir seiner Ziele wohl bewusst. Aber egal, was ich davon halte, sie sind kein Grund, ihn als Mörder zu bezeichnen. Oder wir übersehen ein Glied in der Kette."
languages.original_text: "I am well aware of his ambitions. But, however I may feel about them, it is not cause to call him a murderer. Or perhaps we are missing a link in the chain."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin mir seiner Ziele wohl bewusst. Aber egal, was ich davon halte, sie sind kein Grund, ihn als Mörder zu bezeichnen. Oder wir übersehen ein Glied in der Kette."

languages.text: 「彼の野心はよく知っている。しかし、どんなに思っても、殺人犯と呼ぶ理由にはならない。あるいは、何かを欠いているのかもしれない。」
languages.original_text: "I am well aware of his ambitions. But, however I may feel about them, it is not cause to call him a murderer. Or perhaps we are missing a link in the chain."

traits.locale_text: 「彼の野心はよく知っている。しかし、どんなに思っても、殺人犯と呼ぶ理由にはならない。あるいは、何かを欠いているのかもしれない。」
